nodes.name: 加拿大
nodes.summary: 加拿大是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联58种鸟类，包括黑嘴天鹅、雪雁、鹊鸭等58种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LeConte's sparrow
nodes.summary: LeConte's sparrow（LeConte's sparrow，学名 Ammospiza leconteii），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联14个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: LC

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: LeConte's sparrow breeds in select areas of Canada, such as northeastern British Columbia, across Alberta, Saskatchewan and southern Manitoba as well as central Ontario and into Quebec; and as far south as northern Michigan, Montana and Minnesota
